name: Garden Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Broccoli, sliced into half-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the cauliflower into flowerettes.
2. Spread the cooked rice on the bottom of a 10x8 inch baking dish.
3. Steam the vegetables and place them on top of the rice.
4. Top with marinara sauce.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Sprinkle grated soy kaas over the casserole (optional).
7. Return to oven to melt the cheese (optional).
8. Garnish with a few zucchini slices, if desired.
